news.title: AACR: Former Genentech leader engineers startup with vision for ‘smart’ cancer drugs

news.title: FDA celebrates progress to end animal testing but experts warn there’s still a long way to go
news.snippet: The FDA says it has hit the one-year goals of its roadmap for ending animal testing. Experts are split on how impactful the agency's actions will be.

news.title: AACR: FDA vet Pazdur bemoans state of agency, warns of political influence and ‘sense of anxiety’
news.snippet: Asked by Fierce if he'd consider returning to the FDA, Pazdur said he wouldn't serve again under the Trump administration "for obvious reasons."

news.title: OpenAI launches biotech-specific AI model dubbed GPT-Rosalind
news.snippet: Following its recently announced partnership with Novo Nordisk, OpenAI is introducing a new reasoning model, GPT-Rosalind, to support research in biology, drug discovery and translational medicine.

news.title: Roivant’s CEO thinks China is a ‘red herring’

news.title: Kailera CEO 'knew we were in a good spot' before obesity biotech's record-breaking $625M IPO
news.snippet: Kailera Therapeutics appears to have set a new benchmark for biotech IPOs with an upsized $625 million offering to fund its pipeline of obesity therapies.

news.title: Small pools, big ideas: How the rare disease community is reimagining clinical trials
news.snippet: The traditional gold standard of clinical trials with a randomized, placebo-controlled design involving hundreds of patients has inherently been unfeasible for the rare disease community.

news.title: Pfizer–backed Storm blows into $56M series C, launches phase 2 sarcoma trial

news.title: Teva scores in appeal as court revives $177M verdict against Lilly in migraine patent spat

news.title: Verily Health simplifies medical jargon alphabet soup with AI-powered app in new campaign
news.snippet: The company highlights the features of its AI-powered Verily Me app in two 30-second spots that launched across national TV, audio and social channels.

news.title: Omnicom brews Olixir from FCB Health, rebranding storied agency after Interpublic takeover
news.snippet: Omnicom Health has stamped its mark on the recently acquired FCB Health New York, rebranding the ad agency as Olixir New York in the aftermath of the mega-merger with Interpublic Group.

news.title: UPDATED: Heeding RFK Jr.'s call, FDA reclassifies 12 unapproved peptides ahead of advisory committee meeting
news.snippet: The FDA’s Pharmacy Compounding Advisory Committee will convene this summer to discuss seven peptides that are currently restricted from use in compounded medications.

news.title: Novartis CEO Vas Narasimhan joins Anthropic’s board as biopharma’s ties to AI deepen
news.snippet: AI heavyweight Anthropic has appointed Novartis CEO Vas Narasimhan to its board of directors as the link between the pharmaceutical industry and Silicon Valley deepens.

news.title: How Trump is pushing psychedelics reform through the health agencies

news.title: STAT+: Cell therapy primed liver transplant patients to avoid organ rejection, small study shows

news.title: Opinion: Don’t believe headlines saying that vaccine skepticism is widespread
news.snippet: Despite some headlines, a new poll does not show that most Americans no longer trust vaccines.

news.title: Pregnancy vaccine reduces baby hospital admissions for RSV by 80%
news.snippet: A study confirms the vaccine gives excellent protection for babies against life-threatening chest infections.

news.title: Rollout of Covid vaccines extraordinary feat - inquiry report
news.snippet: Covid vaccines saved hundreds of thousands of lives, but a small minority harmed need better support, says report.

news.title: Mental health support to be offered to people with diabetes in UK first
news.snippet: People with diabetes are twice as likely to have depression, a charity backing tailored support says.

news.title: Three young people contract meningitis in Weymouth
news.snippet: Young people are to be offered the MenB vaccine after three cases of meningitis were confirmed.

news.title: Lawmakers clash with RFK Jr as he shifts focus away from vaccines

news.title: Breakthrough £90,000 Alzheimer's drugs unlikely to benefit patients, report suggests
news.snippet: A major review has provoked a backlash after concluding the medicines provide too little benefit to be noticed.

news.title: What is the UK Covid inquiry and how does it work?
